================================================================================
IGG CONQUERORS (الفاتحون العصر الذهبي) - PROTOCOL ANALYSIS
Package: com.igg.android.conquerors
Capture: capture.pcap (524166 bytes)
Total TCP packets with payload: 469
================================================================================

================================================================================
PHASE 1: GATEWAY AUTHENTICATION
Gateway: 54.93.167.80:5997
Packets: 2
================================================================================

--- Packet #429 [CLIENT -> GATEWAY] ---
Opcode: 0x000B  Length: 79B  Raw size: 79B
Hex: 4f000b000100000000000000c9aa1e7c0000000020007a376b45525610541672356e115c0516551570353d4654574755457b65694a00000000000200000000000000d30000000eff003f0000000001

  [0x000B] AUTH REQUEST (Client -> Gateway)
  Bytes 0-1:   4f00 = Length: 79
  Bytes 2-3:   0b00 = Opcode: 0x000B
  Bytes 4-7:   01000000 = Version: 1
  Bytes 8-11:  00000000 = Padding/zeros
  Bytes 12-15: c9aa1e7c = IGG ID: 2082384585
  Bytes 16-19: 00000000 = Padding/zeros
  Bytes 20-21: 2000 = Token length: 32
  Bytes 22-53: Token (32B): 7a376b45525610541672356e115c0516551570353d4654574755457b65694a00
  Bytes 54-end: Remaining (25B): 000000000200000000000000d30000000eff003f0000000001
    Possible fields in remaining:
    [0:4] = 00000000 = 0 (0x00000000)
    [4:8] = 02000000 = 2 (0x00000002)
    [8:12] = 00000000 = 0 (0x00000000)
    [12:16] = d3000000 = 211 (0x000000D3)
    [16:20] = 0eff003f = 1057029902 (0x3F00FF0E)
    [20:24] = 00000000 = 0 (0x00000000)
    [24:end] = 01

--- Packet #466 [GATEWAY -> CLIENT] ---
Opcode: 0x000C  Length: 68B  Raw size: 68B
Hex: 44000c00c9aa1e7c000000000d0035342e39332e3139322e323430581b2000623532633066343163653761326465633362306435613737653239616231663201d3000000

  [0x000C] AUTH RESPONSE (Gateway -> Client)
  Bytes 0-1:   4400 = Length: 68
  Bytes 2-3:   0c00 = Opcode: 0x000C
  Bytes 4-7:   c9aa1e7c = IGG ID: 2082384585
  Bytes 8-11:  00000000 = Padding/zeros
  Bytes 12-13: 0d00 = IP string length: 13
  Bytes 14-26: 35342e39332e3139322e323430 = Redirect IP: "54.93.192.240"
  Bytes 27-28: 581b = Redirect Port: 7000
  Bytes 29-30: 2000 = Token length: 32
  Bytes 31-62: Token: "b52c0f41ce7a2dec3b0d5a77e29ab1f2"
  Token hex: 6235326330663431636537613264656333623064356137376532396162316632
  Bytes 63-end: Remaining (5B): 01d3000000
    Byte 63: 01 = 1
    Bytes 64-67: d3000000 = World ID: 211

  >>> REDIRECT: 54.93.192.240:7000
  >>> TOKEN: b52c0f41ce7a2dec3b0d5a77e29ab1f2
  >>> WORLD: 211

================================================================================
KEY FINDINGS FOR BOT DEVELOPMENT
================================================================================

1. CONNECTION FLOW:
   Step 1: Connect TCP to Gateway 54.93.167.80:5997
   Step 2: Send 0x000B with IGG ID + 32-byte auth token
   Step 3: Receive 0x000C with redirect IP:port + session token
   Step 4: Connect TCP to Game Server (from 0x000C redirect)
   Step 5: Send 0x001F with IGG ID + session token (from 0x000C)
   Step 6: Receive 0x0020 (login accepted)
   Step 7: Send 0x0021 (world entry)
   Step 8: Receive game data flood

2. PACKET FORMAT:
   [2 bytes LE] total packet length (includes these 2 bytes)
   [2 bytes LE] opcode
   [variable]   payload

3. CAPTURED VALUES:
   IGG ID: 2082384585
   0x000B Token (32B): 7a376b45525610541672356e115c0516551570353d4654574755457b65694a00
   Redirect: 54.93.192.240:7000
   Session Token: b52c0f41ce7a2dec3b0d5a77e29ab1f2
   World ID: 211
